channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Northern Territory investigates possible diphtheria death amid ongoing outbreak
item.description: Health authorities in the Northern Territory (NT) are investigating a suspected death from diphtheria, which, if confirmed, would be the first fatal case in Australia since 2018. NT Health is awaiting...

item.title: Adani Enterprises settles $275 million civil liability with US over Iran gas shipments
item.description: Adani Enterprises, flagship company of the Adani Group led by Gautam Adani, has reached a $275 million settlement with the United States Treasury Department to resolve potential civil liabilities over...

item.title: Papa Johns Begins Drone Delivery Tests in North Carolina Using Sandwiches
item.description: Papa Johns has partnered with Wing, Alphabet's drone delivery company, to launch a test program in Indian Trail, North Carolina, near Charlotte. Instead of starting with its signature pizzas, the init...

item.title: Balancing Community Development and First Nations Consultation in Canada
item.description: The article highlights a growing tension in Canada between local development projects and First Nations consultation rights. While Canadians broadly support reconciliation and the constitutional duty ...

item.title: A Look Back at ABC Film Review Magazine Covers from the 1950s
item.description: ABC Film Review, first published in 1950, quickly became a major part of British cinema culture. Originally intended as a promotional magazine for the Associated British Cinemas (ABC) circuit, it evol...

item.title: Matatu Owners Reject Government Fuel Price Agreement, Strike Continues
item.description: A recent joint press briefing led by Energy CS Opiyo Wandayi with transport sector stakeholders ended in confusion after contradictory statements emerged. CS Wandayi claimed that an agreement had been...

item.title: UAE accelerates west-east oil pipeline expansion to reduce reliance on Strait of Hormuz amid regional tensions
item.description: The United Arab Emirates is accelerating a significant pipeline project to boost its oil export capacity by bypassing the volatile Strait of Hormuz. According to UAE Crown Prince Sheikh Khaled bin Moh...

item.title: Risks and legal issues of travelling in cargo lorries in Tanzania
item.description: A young man from Morogoro named Mr Shukurani Kigodi lost his life after boarding a cement-laden cargo lorry to Iringa for a funeral because he could not afford bus fare. The lorry overturned near Miku...

item.title: Pakistan Reaffirms Support for Saudi Arabia After Drone Attacks
item.description: Pakistan on Monday strongly condemned the drone attacks launched on Saudi Arabia, reiterating its full and unwavering support for the Kingdom. Saudi authorities reported that three unmanned aircraft, ...

item.title: United States Temporarily Pauses Military Cooperation Board with Canada
item.description: The United States has announced that it is pausing its long-standing military board with Canada, a key forum for bilateral defence cooperation. The decision reflects a shift in U.S. priorities, though...

item.title: Deputy President Kindiki Hints at Possible Fuel Price Reduction Following Nationwide Protests
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has indicated that the government is considering reducing fuel prices in Kenya following widespread protests that turned violent in several areas. The demonstrations, ...

item.title: Delayed detection and local practices worsen Ebola outbreak in Congo
item.description: The recent Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo has already become one of the largest on record due to multiple delays in detection and containment. Health officials confirmed new ca...

item.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Briefly Delayed by Chinese Security During State Visit
item.description: During a recent trip to China, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent experienced a brief but tense encounter with Chinese security officials outside the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. The incide...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Portraits of Elizabeth Taylor on the Set of Cleopatra, 1962
item.description: In 1962, French photographer Philippe Le Tellier captured a series of striking behind-the-scenes portraits of Elizabeth Taylor during the filming of Cleopatra at Rome's Cinecittà studios. These photog...

item.title: Chadema urges Tanzanians to demand new Constitution and better leadership
item.description: On Sunday, May 17, 2026, Chadema leaders, led by vice-chairman John Heche, called for a new Constitution and urgent political reforms in Tanzania during the launch of the New Constitution Operation an...

item.title: Philippines and Singapore strengthen healthcare cooperation through training and public health initiatives
item.description: In a recent bilateral meeting, health officials from the Philippines and Singapore agreed to enhance cooperation in healthcare development. Health Secretary Ted Herbosa met with Singapore Health Minis...

item.title: Importance of Staying Hydrated During Hot Summer Days
item.description: As summer temperatures rise across the Philippines, maintaining proper hydration remains crucial for health. Experts emphasize that drinking enough water is essential to prevent dehydration, heat exha...

item.title: Antonia Bembo’s 1707 Opera ‘Ercole Amante’ Premieres in Paris Over Three Centuries After Its Composition
item.description: Antonia Bembo, born around 1640 in Venice, was a talented musician who fled an abusive marriage to settle in Paris in 1677. Though trained in music by prominent Venetian composers like Francesco Caval...

item.title: Brush Fire in Simi Valley Destroys Structure, Forces Evacuations
item.description: A rapidly spreading brush fire, named the Sandy Fire, broke out in Simi Valley, California, before 11 a.m. on Monday, May 18, 2026. Driven by dry conditions and light gusty winds, the fire quickly exp...

item.title: Slipknot’s Lost Experimental Album ‘Look Outside Your Window’ Receives Full Physical Release
item.description: Slipknot has officially announced the full physical release of their previously unreleased experimental album, ‘Look Outside Your Window’, nearly two decades after it was recorded. Originally created ...
